routes.title: AI Agents & Automation for Business | Akshay Mahajan
routes.description: I build AI agents, chatbots and automation pipelines that take over repetitive work — lead intake, support replies, content and reporting. Based in Surat, India.

routes.title: AI Automation Services | Akshay Mahajan
routes.description: AI agents, chatbots, workflow automation and custom builds. What each one involves, what it costs and how long it takes, plus a free scoping call.

routes.title: Case Studies: AI Products I've Shipped | Akshay Mahajan
routes.description: Four live AI products — a tools directory, an ATS resume builder, an image utility used by over a million people, and a fitness planner. What broke, what I built.

routes.title: Pricing for AI Automation Projects | Akshay Mahajan
routes.description: Project-based pricing for automation setups, AI agents and full builds. Quoted up front after a scoping call, with no hourly surprises.

routes.title: About Akshay Mahajan | AI & Automation Engineer, Surat
routes.description: AI and automation engineer based in Surat, India. No agency layer and no account manager — the person you brief is the person who builds it.

routes.title: Client Feedback | Akshay Mahajan
routes.description: What clients say after handover — the automations, agents and products I built for them, and what actually changed on their side afterwards.

routes.title: Writing on AI Agents & Automation | Akshay Mahajan

routes.title: Contact Akshay Mahajan | AI Automation Engineer
routes.description: Tell me which repetitive task keeps coming back every week. I reply within one working day — by email, WhatsApp, or on a 20-minute scoping call.
